rulings.Case Title: ELAINE PERCY VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 23, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Howard J. White, Inc.¿s demurrer to the negligence, products liability and premises owner/contractor liability causes of action of plaintiffs¿ second amended complaint is sustained with ten days leave to amend to give plaintiffs an opportunity, if they are able to do so, to allege facts sufficient to meet the requirements of Bockrath v. Aldrich Chemical Co., Inc. (1999) 21 Cal.4th 71. The hearing on this demurrer will be at 9:30am in Dept. 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. = (220/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: ELAINE PERCY VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs¿ Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 23, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Howard J. White, Inc.¿s motion to strike is denied. The agency allegations are sufficiently pled. The hearing on this motion will be at 9:30am in Dept. 503, Hon. Teri L. Jackson presiding. = (220/TLJ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Memorandum In Support; Declaration Of Amy Yi; And Declaration Of Hans C. Ruschke
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 23, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Lehigh Hanson, Inc.¿s motion to quash service of summons is continued on the court¿s own motion to September 7, 2011 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 220. = (220/TLJ)
